title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 43.210 - Person arrested to be dealt with according to law
text:
43.210.  Person arrested to be dealt with according to law. — Any person arrested by a member of the patrol shall forthwith be taken by such member before the court or associate circuit judge having jurisdiction of the crime whereof such person so arrested is charged there to be dealt with according to law.
(RSMo 1939 § 8360)
